TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ilaro a dapit ku Ogun State, Nigeria, a tinrekel nu 57,850 a cudad. Tiya a Ilaro so tjuangki nu Yewa South a Panguluan (YEWALAND), ku pangukien nu Egbado tu Western State kanganatu tu Ogun State, Nigeria. Matja nu Ilaro su 50 km tu Abeokuta, nu masitju nu Ogun, ya su 100 km tu Ikeja, nu masitju nu Lagos. Osata a Ilaro a matja nu 19-sekelan a masiakal a lalakayan. Na bayak nu ljemay nu tjaljak nu anak na tua marayaw a imudungan nu ljemay, tu kadua nu katadal nu Ilaro ku matumalay a tanubung. Ya masabal nu Egbado a salaitan ku Ilaro. Paka matjaw a tinongnu nu Ilaro ka nu masanpuan sun pa tsatjeng, ya "Omo Oluwewun" a pangajan ku pangarakupay tua "Ilu Aro."
S.PHON: i…≠aru a dapit ku ugun stat…ô, nig…ôria, a tinr…ôk…ô…≠ nu **,*** a ¶udad. tija a i…≠aru su ¶uaŇčki nu j…ôwa suuth a paŇču…≠uan (j…ôwa…≠and), ku paŇčuki…ôn nu …ôgbadu tu w…ôst…ôrn stat…ô kaŇčanatu tu ugun stat…ô, nig…ôria. ma ¶a nu i…≠aru su ** km tu ab…ôukuta, nu masi ¶u nu ugun, ja su *** km tu ik…ôja, nu masi ¶u nu …≠agus. usata a i…≠aru a ma ¶a nu **-s…ôk…ô…≠an a masiaka…≠ a …≠a…≠akajan. na bajak nu é…ômaj nu ¶a éak nu anak na tua marajaw a imuduŇčan nu é…ômaj, tu kadua nu katada…≠ nu i…≠aru ku matuma…≠aj a tanubuŇč. ja masaba…≠ nu …ôgbadu a sa…≠aitan ku i…≠aru. paka ma ¶aw a tinuŇčnu nu i…≠aru ka nu masanpuan sun pa tsa ¶…ôŇč, ja "umu u…≠uw…ôwun" a paŇčajan ku paŇčarakupaj tua "i…≠u aru."
S.FORM: Ilaro a dapit ku Ogun State, Nigeria, a tinrekel nu 57,850 a cudad. Tiya a Ilaro so tjuangki nu Yewa South a Panguluan (YEWALAND), ku pangukien nu Egbado tu Western State kanganatu tu Ogun State, Nigeria. Matja nu Ilaro su 50 km tu Abeokuta, nu masitju nu Ogun, ya su 100 km tu Ikeja, nu masitju nu Lagos. Osata a Ilaro a matja nu 19-sekelan a masiakal a lalakayan. Na bayak nu ljemay nu tjaljak nu anak na tua marayaw a imudungan nu ljemay, tu kadua nu katadal nu Ilaro ku matumalay a tanubung. Ya masabal nu Egbado a salaitan ku Ilaro. Paka matjaw a tinongnu nu Ilaro ka nu masanpuan sun pa tsatjeng, ya "Omo Oluwewun" a pangajan ku pangarakupay tua "Ilu Aro."
S.PHON: i…≠aru a dapit ku ugun stat…ô, nig…ôria, a tinr…ôk…ô…≠ nu **,*** a ¶udad. tija a i…≠aru su ¶uaŇčki nu j…ôwa suuth a paŇču…≠uan (j…ôwa…≠and), ku paŇčuki…ôn nu …ôgbadu tu w…ôst…ôrn stat…ô kaŇčanatu tu ugun stat…ô, nig…ôria. ma ¶a nu i…≠aru su ** km tu ab…ôukuta, nu masi ¶u nu ugun, ja su *** km tu ik…ôja, nu masi ¶u nu …≠agus. usata a i…≠aru a ma ¶a nu **-s…ôk…ô…≠an a masiaka…≠ a …≠a…≠akajan. na bajak nu é…ômaj nu ¶a éak nu anak na tua marajaw a imuduŇčan nu é…ômaj, tu kadua nu katada…≠ nu i…≠aru ku matuma…≠aj a tanubuŇč. ja masaba…≠ nu …ôgbadu a sa…≠aitan ku i…≠aru. paka ma ¶aw a tinuŇčnu nu i…≠aru ka nu masanpuan sun pa tsa ¶…ôŇč, ja "umu u…≠uw…ôwun" a paŇčajan ku paŇčarakupaj tua "i…≠u aru."
